para_trans: Chief Minister and M.S. The Deputy Chief Minister / Madam
To provide catering services at government accommodation.
regarding the appointment of a service provider.
Government Supplementary Letter No.: Upani-2025 / Pt. No - 25/2025 MASTA-2 (21-A)
Madam Cama Marg, Martyr Rajguru Chowk,
A. No. 9 followed by A. No. 10 are being included in the Government Decision under reference as follows.
"This Government Decision Industry, Power and Labour Department, Government Decision No: BHANKS 2014 / P.No.82 /
Pursuant to the provisions of Part-III / Industry-IV, dated 01/12/202016 and Finance Department Government Decision No. Vyapar
2013 / Q. No. 30/2013 Regulations, Part-II D. The Maharashtra Contingency Expenditure Rules, 1965, dated 17 April 2015,
Sub-Division-2, A.No.10, Rule No. (31) In the financial powers vested in the Administrative Division under (a) (i)
Also, the number after A.No. 10 should be read as A.No. 11.
This Government Supplementary Letter is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
